/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -g -shared -Wl,-soname,libabsl_cord_internal.so.2407.0.0 -o libabsl_cord_internal.so.2407.0.0 CMakeFiles/cord_internal.dir/internal/cord_internal.cc.o CMakeFiles/cord_internal.dir/internal/cord_rep_btree.cc.o CMakeFiles/cord_internal.dir/internal/cord_rep_btree_navigator.cc.o CMakeFiles/cord_internal.dir/internal/cord_rep_btree_reader.cc.o CMakeFiles/cord_internal.dir/internal/cord_rep_crc.cc.o CMakeFiles/cord_internal.dir/internal/cord_rep_consume.cc.o  -Wl,-rpath,"\$ORIGIN/../crc:\$ORIGIN:\$ORIGIN/../base:\$ORIGIN/../numeric:\$ORIGIN/../debugging:" ../crc/libabsl_crc_cord_state.so.2407.0.0 ../crc/libabsl_crc32c.so.2407.0.0 ../crc/libabsl_crc_internal.so.2407.0.0 ../crc/libabsl_crc_cpu_detect.so.2407.0.0 libabsl_str_format_internal.so.2407.0.0 libabsl_strings.so.2407.0.0 libabsl_strings_internal.so.2407.0.0 libabsl_string_view.so.2407.0.0 ../base/libabsl_base.so.2407.0.0 ../base/libabsl_spinlock_wait.so.2407.0.0 -lpthread ../numeric/libabsl_int128.so.2407.0.0 ../debugging/libabsl_debugging_internal.so.2407.0.0 ../base/libabsl_throw_delegate.so.2407.0.0 ../base/libabsl_raw_logging_internal.so.2407.0.0 ../base/libabsl_log_severity.so.2407.0.0
